name: nav-buttons
description: Thin renderer over Docs/Meta/nav-buttons-registry.json. Each blueprint/mechanism declares nav_buttons[]; installer aggregates. v2.3.0 ADDITIVE: adds invoke_command action type for arbitrary Obsidian command dispatch; adds top arrow-row prev/next-day daily-nav (skip-to-nearest-existing with grey-out) when daily blueprint installed (reads .obsidian/daily-notes.json at runtime). Adaptive multi-row layout + hover styling unchanged from v2.0.0.
